text.Build trips that fit your budget, then t: Build trips that fit your budget, then travel with a live companion.
text.Roamly checks estimated flights, stays,: Roamly checks estimated flights, stays, activities, food, and local transport before creating your itinerary. Upload booking screenshots, unlock your trip, and let Roamly guide your travel day.
text.Roamly checks trip costs before building: Roamly checks trip costs before building your plan, so your itinerary is designed around your real budget.
text.Upload hotel, flight, ticket, or reserva: Upload hotel, flight, ticket, or reservation screenshots and Roamly turns them into your trip timeline.
text.Unlock reminders, packing lists, documen: Unlock reminders, packing lists, document checks, Day 1 activation, nearby activities, and up-next guidance.
text.From countdown to check-in, Roamly stays: From countdown to check-in, Roamly stays with the traveler.
text.Get one-week reminders, document and pac: Get one-week reminders, document and packing checklists, 24-hour countdowns, booking timelines, nearby activity sensing, check-ins, skips, up-next guidance, and navigation links to Google Maps, Apple Maps, and Citymapper.
text.One free itinerary. Then unlock only the: One free itinerary. Then unlock only the trip you need.
text.No subscriptions. Each account gets 1 fr: No subscriptions. Each account gets 1 free itinerary, then simple one-time purchases per trip.
Generate one full itinerary per account. Once generated, it is locked and cannot be edited.
text.Generate one locked day-by-day itinerary: Generate one locked day-by-day itinerary for one trip. Best when you only need the plan.
text.Add reminders, document and packing chec: Add reminders, document and packing checklists, booked item timeline, Day 1 activation, nearby activities, and up-next help to one locked itinerary.
text.Complete Trip Pack: full itinerary plus: Complete Trip Pack: full itinerary plus Live Trip Companion for one trip. Saves $0.99.
text.Continue a draft, open a locked itinerar: Continue a draft, open a locked itinerary, or jump straight into Live Trip Companion.
text.Start with one free itinerary per accoun: Start with one free itinerary per account. Unlock only the new trips you want to fully use.
Log in and keep your trips together.
text.Roamly uses a separate Supabase auth set: Roamly uses a separate Supabase auth setup from ReviewIntel. Your trip data stays under Roamly tables only.
text.Keep the profile simple. Roamly only nee: Keep the profile simple. Roamly only needs the identity required for trips, ownership, and support.
text.Roamly can remind you about packing, doc: Roamly can remind you about packing, documents, check-in times, and what's up next during your trip.
text.Phone reminders are blocked. You can sti: Phone reminders are blocked. You can still use in-app notifications in Roamly.
In-app notifications work automatically. Phone reminders need browser permission on this device.
text.This itinerary is locked. To make major: This itinerary is locked. To make major changes, create a new itinerary.
